name: EA SPORTS FC™ 24
short_description: EA SPORTS FC™ 24 welcomes you to The World’s Game: the most true-to-football experience ever with HyperMotionV, PlayStyles optimised by Opta, and an enhanced Frostbite™ Engine.
supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Japanese*, Korean, Polish*, Portuguese - Brazil*, Simplified Chinese*, Spanish - Latin America*, Traditional Chinese, Arabic*, Czech, Danish, Dutch*, Norwegian, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Swedish, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
